signals.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
signals.summary: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.
signals.aiSummary: Databricks将GPT-5.5集成到企业智能体工作流中，在OfficeQA Pro基准测试中创下新纪录

signals.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
signals.summary: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT推出个人财务管理功能，用户可连接金融账户获得AI财务建议，标志着AI应用场景进一步扩展

signals.title: How ChatGPT adoption broadened in early 2026
signals.summary: ChatGPT adoption surged in Q1 2026, with fastest growth among users over 35 and more balanced gender usage, signaling broader mainstream AI adoption.
signals.aiSummary: ChatGPT在2026年Q1用户激增，35岁以上用户增长最快，性别使用更均衡，标志AI主流化加速

signals.title: How enterprises are scaling AI
signals.summary: How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale.
signals.aiSummary: 企业AI规模化实践：从早期试验到通过信任、治理、工作流设计实现规模化影响

signals.title: OpenAI launches DeployCo to help businesses build around intelligence
signals.summary: OpenAI launches DeployCo, a new enterprise deployment company built to help organizations bring frontier AI into production and turn it into measurable business impact.
signals.aiSummary: OpenAI推出企业部署公司DeployCo，帮助组织将前沿AI投入生产并产生商业价值
